zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Bates於1474年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾時，她的父親John Bate15歲，母親Mrs Margaret Bates5歲。她於1490年與John James Weeks在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1526年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice de Bates于1474年出生在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾时，她的父亲John Bate15岁，母亲Mrs Margaret Bates5岁。她于1490年与John James Weeks在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1526年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bates
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bate with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also common in Ireland.
Americanized form of German   Betz  . See also   Betts  .

variants.name: Bate
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Bate. It could represent an unrecorded Old English name Bata, or a form of Batte, a short form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Bart-, such as Bartelmeu (see Bartholomew ) or Bartram (see Bertram ).
perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English antecedent of the modern English dialect bate ‘river island or land liable to flooding’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Bates was born in 1474, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bate, was 15 and her mother, Mrs Margaret Bates, was 5. She married John James Weeks in 1490, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1526, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice de Bates est née en 1474, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bate, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs Margaret Bates, avait 5 ans. Elle a épousé John James Weeks en 1490, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1526, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice de Bates 1474 in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bate 15 und ihre Mutter Mrs Margaret Bates 5. Sie hat 1490 in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John James Weeks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1526 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Bates è nata il nel 1474 nel Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bate, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Mrs Margaret Bates, aveva 5 anni. Lei sposato John James Weeks nel 1490, nel Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1526, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Batesが1474年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルで生まれた時，父John Bateは15歳，母Mrs Margaret Batesは5歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルでJohn James Weeksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1526年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Bates(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bate(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Margaret Bates(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 John James Weeks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1526년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice de Bates nasceu em 1474, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bate, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Margaret Bates, tinha 5 anos. Ela casou-se com John James Weeks em 1490, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1526, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Bates родилась в 1474 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bate было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Margaret Bates, 5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John James Weeks в 1490 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1526 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice de Bates nació en 1474, en Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bate, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mrs Margaret Bates, tenía 5 años. Se casó con John James Weeks en 1490, en Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1526, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
